products.title: 24/7 Hybrid Gloves e.s.motion
products.description: Gloves that don't let anything in. Our 24/7 Hybrid gloves are at work all day long. They have a knitted construction with a double, roughened nitrile coating and neoprene cuff. This aids in their liquid and oil repellency - as well as slip resistance when wet. They're specially built for work that requires the highest levels of dexterity and excellent grip (think assembling oily parts), so expect and superior fit and great tactile sensitivity. EN 388:2016 , certified protection against mechanical risks, 4131X ANSI 105 , Abrasion: 6, Cut (TDM): A1, Puncture: 2 extremely flexible and hard-wearing thanks to a fine-knit polyester construction excellent fit with deal tactile sensitivity non-slip light and robust double nitrile coating with roughened structure liquid and oil repellent, optimal slip resistance even when wet reflective elements ensure greater visibility comfortable and quick to put on thanks to the pull-on aid stable fit and additional pulse protection thanks to the strong, elastic neoprene collar hook-and-loop fastener for a secure fit areas of application: For work that requires the highest level of dexterity and excellent grip (e.g. Assembling oily and dry parts and work that requires a glove with a high level of grip and a perfect fit) length: approx. 9,2 in E.S.TOOL CONCEPT COMPATIBLE Suitable to combine with the e.s.tool concept glove holder* a magnetic attachment on the gloves pairs to the e.s.tool concept belts* The glove holder e.s.tool concept* can also be used to attach the tool leash e.s.tool concept* to the glove and secure tools against falling. Tested to ANSI/ISEA 121-2018 standard (drop test) up to 1.32 lbs Thanks to the preparation on the glove cuff, the gloves can be quickly attached to the patented Glove holder*. Using the Fidlock® magnetic locking system, the gloves can be quickly attached to each other and then to the belt using our Glove holder. The gloves can also be connected to our Tool leash e.s.tool concept* using our Glove holder. Tools can be secured to the glove using the Tool leash to prevent them from falling off, which is ideal when working at heights. In conjunction with the Glove holder*, this product contains magnetic elements that can harm people with pacemakers, ICD devices or other medical implants. * not included in delivery Material: 1. Shell: 98% Polyester / 2% Caoutchouc 2. Shell: 82 % Polyamide / 18% Elastane Palm: 100% Nitrile Care instructions: No washing Do not bleach Do not tumble dry Do not iron Do not Dryclean
products.material: Shell: 98% Polyester / 2% Caoutchouc 2. Shell: 82 % Polyamide / 18% Elastane Palm: 100% Nitrile

products.title: 3-in-1 Functional Snow Jacket e.s.trail pure
products.description: Built to handle tough winter weather conditions, this 3-in-1 workwear snow jacket offers versatile warmth with our warmest ISOFILL® 200 synthetic filling and a removable inner layer, so you don't overheat. The jacket is also packed with plenty of smart details like the breathable ventilation zones and pockets built a bit larger to fit your gloves. We've also made sure the jacket is waterproof, windproof, and breathable with our signature dryplexx® extreme membrane, meaning all-day performance is still at the forefront. Complete the outfit with our matching snow pants for a protective winter outfit. Features outer jacket: EN 343:2019 Class 3/1 with inner jacket (Class 3/3 without inner jacket) Waterproofness and breathability certified Waterproof, windproof, and breathable thanks to dryplexx® membrane Comfortable, lightweight, and warm ISOFILL® 200 filling Waterproof seams 2 slash pockets Chest pocket and lift pass pocket with concealed zips Interior zip pocket Water-repellent 2-way front zip with chin guard Zipper tapes on the slash pockets and front for easy operation, even with winter gloves Underarm ventilation with water-repellent 2-way zip Comfortable mesh padding in the shoulder area for carrying equipment Soft fleece inner collar Size and volume adjustable hood that can be attached at the front Adjustable cuffs with hook-and-loop closure One-hand width adjustment on the hem Perfect for branding: Minimal seams, large surfaces, and a discreet design Material: Shell 100% Polyamide ( approx. 5,40 oz/sq yard ) Lining 100% Polyester Care instructions: Machine wash 86 °F / 30 °C Do not bleach Normal tumble dry (low temperature) Iron low heat Do not Dryclean Do not wring Features of inner jacket: Light, quilted jacket Soft, wind-repellent, and warming ISOFILL® 100 filling Full front zip with zip stand-up collar 2 side pockets with zip closure Zipper tapes for easy operation, also with winter gloves Packable construction, so it can be compactly stowed away in a bag Material: Shell 100% Polyamide ( approx. 1,15 oz/sq yard ) Lining 100% Polyester Padding 100% Polyester Care instructions: Machine wash 86 °F / 30 °C Do not bleach Do not tumble dry Do not iron Do not Dryclean Do not wring

products.title: Amarillo 6" Soft Toe Chelsea Boot
products.description: The Amarillo is a certified safety boot with a Chelsea silhouette. Though safety certified, the Amarillo does not feature a toe cap. The outsole is a slip resistant Vibram rubber. It has a slip-on construction for easy on-off and is static dissipative. ASTM F2892-18 certified occupational shoe without toe cap Chelsea boot silhouette waxed nubuck leather upper side elastic inserts Textile lining with microfiber heel reinforcement full-length, anatomically shaped, and removable insole slip-resistant Vibram rubber/EVA outsole according to SR (acc. to ASTM F3445-21) static dissipative SD100 (acc. to ASTM F2892-18) Weight: 450 grams for size 9

products.title: Boulder 6" Soft Toe Boot
products.description: The Boulder is a sturdy soft-toe boot with a full leather upper and tongue to help you tackle tasks in comfort, with the signature feel of a classic work boot. The outsole is made with a slip-resistant Vibram rubber, and the closed tongue construction keeps out dirt and debris. Furthermore, the Boulder Mid is certifiably static dissipative and protects against the build-up of static electricity. If you’re looking for a new, signature leather work boot, grab the Boulder Mid. ASTM F2892-18 certified occupational shoe without protective toe cap Leather upper and tongue soft padded tongue and collar Textile lining with microfiber heel reinforcement and collar closed tongue construction prevents dirt from penetrating full-length, removable insole slip-resistant Vibram rubber/EVA outsole according to SR (acc. to ASTM F3445-21) static dissipative SD100 (acc. to ASTM F2892-18) Weight: 535 grams for size 9

ASTM F2413-18 certified safety shoe with steel toe cap leather upper and tongue suede leather vamp soft padded tongue and collar textile lining with microfiber heel reinforcement and collar full-length removable insole innovative midsole cushioning technology slip-resistant rubber outsole according to SR (acc. to ASTM F3445-21) static dissipative SD100 (acc. to ASTM F2413-18) fuel-resistant FO according to EN ISO 20345:2022 Weight: 495 grams for size 9

products.title: Canberra Steel Toe Work Shoe
products.description: Tough work shoes get a trendy rework with our Canberra Steel Toe Work Shoe. The sporty, certified safety shoes don a cool, hairy suede upper that's enhanced with some breathable mesh hits, a padded tongue and collar, and some reinforcements in the heel to make sure your feet breathe and don't slip out of the shoe. The shoes have been built with a steel toe cap and have been tested to rigorous safety standards to handle heavy duty working conditions. ASTM F2413-24 safety shoe with steel toe cap EN ISO 20345:2022 + A1:2024 Heat-resistant up to approx. 300 °F SD100 Static dissipative SR Slip resistance class Suede upper with breathable mesh Mesh tongue with leather application Padded tongue and collar Textile lining with microfiber heel reinforcement Full-length and removable insole Rubber/EVA outsole Approx. 1.0 lbs for size 9

products.title: Cargo Work Pants e.s.motion 2020
products.description: Built to get the job done, the Cargo Work Pants e.s.motion 2020 unite flexibility and durability. The Flexbelt® waistband and elasticated side elements free your movement, while CORDURA® knee zones and a triple-stitched inside leg seam ensure these pants stand up to the toughest of work. If things get strenuous, there are zipper vents on the back of both thighs. Knee pad pockets allow you to add protection only when you need it. Modern pants built to get things done Flexbelt® waistband with elasticated side elements Extra sturdy triple-stitched seam on inside leg Wide belt loops with Velcro for worker bag 2 side pockets and 2 back pockets reinforced with CORDURA® Reinforced ruler pocket and multi-compartment thigh pocket Zipper vents at the back of both thighs Knee pad pocket with Velcro fastener at the top Knee zone in durable CORDURA® Reflective details NEXT LEVEL KNEE PROTECTION Concealed top-loading knee pad pockets Perfect ergonomics: Top-loading pocket that works with all knee pads for our STRAUSS work pants. A protective flap covers the pocket opening. This prevents the knee pads from slipping and from dust and debris getting in. Material: Shell: 65% Polyester / 35% Cotton (approx. 7.23 oz/sq yard ) Care instructions: Machine wash warm 140 °F / 60 °C Do not bleach Tumble dry Warm iron Dry cleaning possible

products.description: A necessity in every worker’s wardrobe, these carpenter jeans come in a classic, relaxed fit and have been reinforced with triple-stitched main seams for superior durability. The slanted front pockets mean you can keep your essentials close, while the requisite hammer loop combined with a small side pocket ensure ease of access on the jobsite. The D-ring on the waistband adds an extra dose of utility, making these carpenter jeans a reliable choice when working on your craft. Classic, relaxed fit work pants 2 slanted front pockets Additional coin pocket on the right side 2 patch square back pockets Hammer loop Ruler pocket with patch multipockets D-ring on 1st right waistband loop Triple-stitched main seams Material: Shell 99 % Cotton /1 % Elastane (approx. 13.48 oz/sq yard ) White 100% Cotton (approx. 12.03 oz/sq yard) Care Instructions (darkwashed): Machine wash 104 °F / 40 °C Do not bleach Tumble dry, normal temperature Iron Medium heat Do Not Dryclean Care Instructions (black): Machine wash 104 °F / 40 °C Do not bleach Tumble dry, low temperature Iron Low heat Do Not Dryclean Care Instructions (white): Machine wash 104 °F / 40 °C Non Chlorine bleach when needed Tumble dry, low temperature Iron Low heat Dryclean any solvent normal cycle

products.title: Chino Pants e.s.e:pic
products.description: Look sharp and perform in the e.s.e:pic Chino Pants. Made from a durable twill fabric that combines CORDURA® NYCO, T400 stretch, and cotton, they offer a refined look with the strength to handle real work. The modern tapered leg, narrow hem, and regular waist fit keep things professional, while the Flexbelt® waistband prevents pulling and the double-stitched inseam adds lasting durability. These chinos are built to move between jobsite and office without missing a beat. products.title: Doonan 12" Comp Toe Work Boot
products.description: A Western tradition meets precision engineering. The Doonan delivers exceptional, locked-in comfort and side-to-side stability thanks to the BOA® Fit System closure. Its classic, nubuck leather upper contains our waterproof, windproof, and breathable dryplexx® membrane, meaning your feet won’t feel the elements outside. When it comes to getting the job done, a host of certified safety features like the composite toe cap, heat resistance, fuel resistance, and slip resistance make it a perfect companion on the farm or in a workshop. ASTM F2413-24 and CSA Z195-14 certified safety boot with 100% metal-free composite safety toe Grade 1 composite toe cap reinforced with carbon fiber, compliant with EN ISO 22568-2:2019 BOA® Fit System for an easily adjustable, precise fit Waterproof, windproof, and breathable thanks to the dryplexx®-membrane High-quality waxed nubuck leather upper Textile lining and microfiber collar for added comfort Functional leather pull loops for easy on Fully removable, full-length insole Rubber/EVA outsole with surrounding TPU frame Slip-resistance class SR according to ASTM F2413-24 Electrical hazard EH (ASTM F2413-24) / Electric shock resistant (ESR) (CSA Z195-14) Fuel-resistant FO and heat-resistant HRO up to approx. 150 °C (acc. with EN ISO 20345:2022 + A1:2024) Weight: 2.04 lbs for size 9; Shaft height from sole edge approx. 10.23 inches for size 9

products.title: Double Front Multipocket Pants e.s.vintage
products.description: Tough and functional, these double front work pants are built for your life on and off the jobsite. They’re constructed with a stretchy waistband and sturdy cotton canvas blend with the perfect amount of stretch for mobility on the job. Designed with pre-shaped legs, knee pad compatibility, and multiple utility pockets (including a secure cell phone pocket), the pants combine practicality and style for all-day comfort and performance. comfortable slim fit pre-shaped leg with knee darts stretchy Flexbelt® waistband double outer fabric from thigh to calf for knee pads pads can be inserted from below top corners secured with rivets 2 back pockets 2 slit pockets: right leg ruler pocket with small patch multipocket with velcro fastener suitable for large cell phone left leg 2nd cell phone pocket 2 hammer loops (right + left next to back trouser pockets) carabiner trailer hook below right waistband loop robust canvas material with light washed effect contrasting accessories + quilting coordinated Material: 48% Cotton / 36% Elastomultiester / 16% Polyamide (approx. 9,14 oz/sq yard ) Care instructions: Machine wash 104 °F / 40 °C Do not bleach Tumble dry, low temperature Iron, low heat Dry cleaning any solvent, normal cycle

products.title: Double Front Ripstop Cargo Work Pants e.s.e:pic
products.description: These double front pants are cut to a relaxed, looser fit and made from a lightweight ripstop material that's surprisingly tough. The combination of breathable fabric and ease of movement makes them ideal for warm-weather work. They feature plenty of pocket storage and knee-pad pockets designed to accept STRAUSS knee pads – perfect for jobs where you must occasionally work from the floor. relaxed fit made from a modern ripstop fabric Flexbelt ® waistband double layer knees has an opening at the bottom for a knee pad that can be closed with a hook-and-loop fastener, and a small flap on the opening fixes the knee pad in place 2 rounded pockets with reinforcement, additional coin pocket on the right, zip pocket on the left hidden pockets on both sides for attaching a tape measure and knife with a clip 2 back pockets, one of which a flap and snap fastener can be closed both back pockets have a hammer loop on the side thin, ruler pocket on the right leg with reinforced opening edge ruler pocket has a ventilation pocket with a zip and mesh lining cell phone pocket red STRAUSS silicon label in the corner of the cell phone pocket all pocket flaps have a firm insert that gives the flaps strong hold D-ring next to the first belt loop on the right side triple-stitched inner leg seam Material: Shell 50% Polyamide / 48% Cotton / 2% Elastane (approx. 6,34 oz/sq yard) Care instructions: Machine wash warm 104 °F / 40 °C Do not bleach Normal tumble dry (low temperature) Iron low heat Do not Dryclean
products.material: Shell 50% Polyamide / 48% Cotton / 2% Elastane (approx. 6,34 oz/sq yard)

products.title: Double Front Work Pants e.s.iconic
products.description: STRAUSS has taken the classic double front work pants and re-engineered it for modern workers. The pants come in a relaxed fit, and the traditional cotton fabric contains a bit of elastane, so the pants retain a casual look but with a little more comfort thanks to the added stretch. For durability, heavy wear-and-tear areas have been reinforced with triple seams, and CORDURA® reinforcements are on each pocket, the back hem, and from the thigh to the calf for the knee pad inserts. When it comes to utility, these pants feature hidden pockets on both sides for attaching a tape measure and knife with a clip. The square side pockets are perfect for extra storage and easily accessable when crouching. For workers often on their knees, the knee pad inserts and sturdy double front structure will keep you protected on the jobsite. classic relaxed fit work pants with stretch fabric featuring knee-shaping darts additional CORDURA® reinforcement from thigh to calf for knee pads insertable from below 2 square front pockets with CORDURA® reinforcement additional coin pocket on the right hidden pockets on both sides for attaching a tape measure and knife with clip 2 back pockets with contrasting CORDURA® fabric at the bottom and on the openings left rear leg pocket up to the side seam made of CORDURA® fabric hammer loop ruler pocket with contrasting CORDURA® fabric in the lower area CORDURA® reinforcement on the back hem of the trousers D-ring on the 1st right waistband loop triple stitched main seams Material: 1. Shell: 98% Cotton / 2% Elastane (approx. 10,91 oz/sq yard) 2. Shell: 100% Polyamide (approx. 10,18 oz/sq yard) Care instructions: Machine wash 104 °F / 40 °C Do not bleach Tumble dry, low temperature Warm, iron Do not dry clean
products.material: Shell: 98% Cotton / 2% Elastane (approx. 10,91 oz/sq yard) 2. Shell: 100% Polyamide (approx. 10,18 oz/sq yard)

products.title: Edmonton 8" Steel Toe Work Boot
products.description: The Edmonton is a heavyweight high-boot that's certified for safety, with a steel toe cap and slip-resistant outsole. It's static dissipative and FO compliant. It features a nubuck leather upper and a closed tongue that keeps out dirt and debris. ASTM F2413-18 certified safety shoe with steel toe cap High-quality waxed nubuck leather upper Mesh tongue with leather trims Padded tongue and microfiber collar Textile lining with microfiber heel reinforcement Closed tongue construction prevents dirt from penetrating Full-surface, anatomically shaped, and removable insole Slip-resistant rubber/EVA outsole according to SR (acc. to ASTM F3445-21) Static dissipative SD100 (acc. to ASTM F2413-18) Fuel-resistant FO in accordance with EN ISO 20345:2022 Weight: 820 grams for size 9

products.title: Glove Holder e.s.tool concept
products.description: Devised using a clever Fidlock® magnetic fastener, the Glove Holder e.s.tool concept keeps your gloves together and within reach when you need them most. It connects to the e.s.tool concept belt to prevent loss and a single hand is all you need to attach and release the gloves. On jobs where your gloves are on and off, this practical holder saves time and and the cost of replacing lost gloves. Keep your gloves handy when you need them most Fidlock® magnetic fastener to attach gloves and glove holder Connect with e.s.tool concept belt Attach and release with just one hand Magnetic inserts can be fitted to the gloves easily Safely secure gloves *Not included in delivery Please note: The Glove holder e.s.tool concept only works in conjunction with the gloves Gloves e.s.trail all-season Assembly Protection Gloves Light graphic mechanic's Gloves e.s.trail 24/7 Hybrid Gloves e.s.motion Light assembly protection Gloves We recommend purchasing one of the e.s.tool concept belts for optimal wearing comfort. This product has magnetic fasteners that could harm people with heart pacemakers, icd units or other medicinal implants.

products.title: Gloves e.s.trail all-season
products.description: Ideal for any time of year, the Gloves e.s.trail all-season have water-repellent, windproof softshell material for bad weather and the lightweight fleece lining for the cold months. The fabric is also breathable, so you can wear them even if it warms up. There are also knuckle protectors for safety and reinforced fingertips for durability. An anti-slip palm and durable anti-slip elements help you achieve excellent grip in any conditions. Fend off the elements with these all-season work gloves EN 388:2016 , Mechanical risks, 3121XP Suitable to attach to e.s.tool concept glove holder and e.s.tool concept belt Secure directly using the e.s.tool concept tool leash Water-repellent, windproof, and breathable gloves Lightweight fleece inner lining Anti-slip palm with large surface area and durable anti-slip pressure for excellent grip Reinforced finger tips Functional for operating touchscreens Knuckle protectors Breathable, durable softshell material on the back of hand Pull-on loop Hook-and-loop fastener for a good fit Length: Approx. 9.25 in E.S.TOOL CONCEPT COMPATIBLE suitable to combine with the e.s.tool concept glove holder* a magnetic attachment on the gloves pairs to the e.s.tool concept belts* the glove holder e.s.tool concept* can also be used to attach the tool leash e.s.tool concept* to the glove and secure tools against falling. Tested to ANSI/ISEA 121-2018 standard (drop test) up to 1.32 lbs Thanks to the preparation on the glove cuff, the gloves can be quickly attached to the patented Glove holder*. Using the Fidlock® magnetic locking system, the gloves can be quickly attached to each other and then to the belt using our Glove holder. The gloves can also be connected to our Tool leash e.s.tool concept* using our Glove holder. Tools can be secured to the glove using the Tool leash to prevent them from falling off, which is ideal when working at heights. In conjunction with the Glove holder*, this product contains magnetic elements that can harm people with pacemakers, ICD devices or other medical implants. * not included in delivery Material: Palm 65% Polyurethane / 35% Polyester Back of hand 85% Polyamide / 15% Elastane Lining 100% Polyester Care instructions: No washing Do not bleach Do not tumble dry Do not iron Do not Dryclean

products.title: Gloves e.s.trail winter
products.description: The Gloves e.s.trail winter provide the warmth and dexterity you need to tackle work in the cold. Perfect for assembly work or simple projects in the cold, the gloves are crafted from a durable soft shell to protect the hands against mechanical risks like cutting, puncturing, and tearing. The anti-slip pressure points ensure superb grip as you grab objects or work your tools. We've also kitted these gloves out with a warm fleece lining and an additional sleeve to provide an extra layer against the cold that extends to your wrists. Getting into the finer details, we've made sure you can still operate any touch screens while wearing the gloves, and we've added a practical fleece insert on the thumb so you can clear off any smeared glasses or a sweaty forehead and keep your eyes on getting the job done. EN 388:2016, 3122X: Certified protection against mechanical risks EN 511:2006, 12X: Certified protection against the cold Water-repellent, windproof and breathable construction Soft fleece inner lining for warmth Reflective design elements provide visibility in low-light conditions Anti-slip palm Durable anti-slip pressure points for excellent grip Reinforced fingertips ensure extra durability Fleece insert on the thumb for quick cleaning Special fingertip design for operating touch screens Backs of the hands made of breathable, durable softshell material Extended inner sleeve for additional protection against the cold Elastic fastener Best for: Dry and cold work environments, specifically assembly work and outdoor work Length: Approx. 10.82 in Material: Palm 60% Polyamide / 40% Polyurethane Back of hand 36% Polyester / 34% Polyurethane / 30% Polyamide Lining 100% Polyester Care instructions: No washing Do not bleach Do not tumble dry Do not iron Do not dryclean

products.title: Harlem Comp Toe Work Shoe
products.description: The Harlem Comp Toe Work Shoe is a certified safety shoe with the look of a trendy trail runner. It's built with a breathable mesh upper that's reinforced with a waterproof and windproof dryplexx® membrane to guarantee your feet are at the top of their game during long days. The metal-free carbon fiber composite toe cap, coupled with a host of safety standards, will protect your feet when you dealing with heavy loads. For those working outdoors, the closed tongue construction prevents dirt and debris from getting in, so you can worry about what matters on the job. ASTM F2413-24 safety shoe with 100% metal-free carbon fiber reinforced composite toe cap in accordance with the latest EN ISO 22568-2:2019 EN ISO 20345:2022 + A1:2024 Heat-resistant up to approx. 300°F SD100 Static dissipative SR slip resistance class Waterproof, windproof and breathable thanks to dryplexx® membrane Rubber overcap for increased abrasion protection Breathable mesh upper with TPU reinforcements for stability and robustness Tongue with comfortable textile lining Padded mesh collar lining Closed tongue construction prevents dirt and debris from entering the shoe Full-surface, anatomically shaped and removable insole Rubber/EVA outsole Approx. 1.3 lbs for size 9

products.title: Kingston 11" Steel Toe Work Boot
products.description: The Kingston is a high-top boot that slips on and off, saving you valuable time in the morning. The heavyweight boot is safety certified, with a slip resistant outsole and a steel toe cap. The boot is also static dissipative and has FO and HRO ratings. ASTM F2413-18 certified safety boots with steel toe cap Leather upper Elastic insert on the inside of the shaft Textile lining with microfiber heel reinforcement Full-length, anatomically shaped, and removable insole Slip-resistant rubber/EVA outsole according to SR (acc. to ASTM F3445-21) Static dissipative SD100 (acc. to ASTM F2413-18), in accordance with EN ISO 20345:2022 Fuel-resistant FO and heat-resistant HRO up to approx. 200 °C (short-term up to approx. 300 °C) Weight: 750 grams for size 9

products.title: Knee Pad Comfort Cell
products.description: These on-size-fits-all knee pads are designed to fit all STRAUSS pants that have knee-pad inserts. They're impact, compression, and abrasion resistant. They've been thoughtfully designed to provide the comfort you need when working from the floor and not and yet not restrict movement when on your feet. Comfortable, ergonomic knee pads AdaptFit technology provides comfortable, flexible fit Tapered fit for added comfort Impact resistant Abrasion resistant Compression resistant One size fits all Compatible with all STRAUSS work pants with knee pad inserts Weight: 192 g Material: 100% Polyurethane

products.title: Knee Pad Ergonomic
products.description: These ultra-light ergonomic knee pads, made from a supremely durable polyethylene foam, provide superior damping, optimal pressure distribution, and excellent form stability. With a flexible design that adapts perfectly to the knees, they ensure exceptional comfort and reliable support when working on your knees. Ultra-light special knee pads with ergonomic knee adjustment made of polyethylene foam excellent damping properties optimum pressure distribution very good form stability: returns to its original form in seconds once the load is removed flexible and functional form, adapts to the shape of the knee ideally very comfortable dimensions: 250 x 150 x 18 mm weight: approx. 74 g/piece delivered in pairs

products.title: Knee Pad Flex
products.description: Lightweight. Breathable. Tough. The Knee Pads Flex feature an ergonomic design and a triple-layer construction that absorbs impact and ensures superb breathability that reduces stress during long hours on the job. Thanks to the pre-shaped knees, pressure is distributed evenly and your protection is always stable. Extremely lightweight knee pads Pre-shaped ergonomic design that eliminates pressure points and maximizes comfort Triple-layer construction: 1x impact foam + 2x breathable comfort foam Flexible construction allows for unrestricted movement Inspired by high-performance sports: effective shock and impact absorption

products.title: Light Assembly Protection Gloves
products.description: A lightweight glove to handle heavy loads, our Light Assembly Protection Gloves are built to operate heavy machinery or any job requiring precision and protection for your hands. They’re built from a combination of strong leather and some breathable mesh for added ventilation. A robust polyamide and cushioning on the palm to secure your grip. It’s the security you need in a lightweight package for your hands. EN 388:2016 , certified protection against mechanical risks, 2111XP ANSI 105 , Abrasion: 6, Cut (TDM): A1, Puncture: 2 strong padding and reinforced areas on the palm robust and comfortable material mix durable palm made of high-quality, genuine leather elastic back of the hand made of breathable mesh material for good ventilation comfortable and quick to put on thanks to the pull-on aid hook-and-loop fastener on the collar for a secure fit areas of use: For a wide variety of activities, from light to heavy work and suitable for mechanics and assembly length: approx. 9 in E.S.TOOL CONCEPT COMPATIBLE Suitable to combine with the e.s.tool concept glove holder* a magnetic attachment on the gloves pairs to the e.s.tool concept belts* The glove holder e.s.tool concept* can also be used to attach the tool leash e.s.tool concept* to the glove and secure tools against falling. Tested to ANSI/ISEA 121-2018 standard (drop test) up to 1.32 lbs Thanks to the preparation on the glove cuff, the gloves can be quickly attached to the patented Glove holder*. Using the Fidlock® magnetic locking system, the gloves can be quickly attached to each other and then to the belt using our Glove holder. The gloves can also be connected to our Tool leash e.s.tool concept* using our Glove holder. Tools can be secured to the glove using the Tool leash to prevent them from falling off, which is ideal when working at heights. In conjunction with the Glove holder*, this product contains magnetic elements that can harm people with pacemakers, ICD devices or other medical implants. * not included in delivery Material: Palm: 100% leather Back of hand: 94% polyamide / 6% elastane Contains non-textile parts of animal origin Care instructions: No washing Do not bleach Do not tumble dry Do not iron Do not Dryclean

products.title: Multipocket Work Bib Overalls e.s.vintage
products.description: Old-school aesthetics meets modern functionality in these hard-working, vintage-looking bib overalls. Designed with a relaxed fit and straight legs, the bib is built with a robust, light-washed canvas cotton material with extra stretch to keep you comfortable and mobile in the job. Practical details include the elastic waistband, side-seam zipper, multiple utility pockets, dual hammer loops, and hem zippers. All these combine for some overalls that perform when you need them. comfortable relaxed fit straight leg elastic waistband with Velcro width adjusters left side-seam with zipper for ease getting dressed/undressed 2 back pockets 2 slit pockets right front coin pocket left front zip pocket right leg ruler pocket with small patch multipocket with Velcro fastener suitable for large cell phone second cell phone pocket on left leg 2 hammer loops (right + left next to back pockets) 2 outer leg zippers on the hem carabiner trailer hook below right waistband loop robust canvas material with light washed effect contrasting accessories + quilting coordinated rivets to secure front pockets front bib: Large pocket with flap and Velcro fastener, zipper pocket, 2 multipockets straps: Length-adjustable button and metal clasp with metal buckle, elastic insert on the back for added comfort when moving and bending Material: 48% Cotton / 36% Elastomultiester / 16% Polyamide (approx. 9.14 oz/sq yard ) Care instructions: Machine wash 104 °F / 40 °C Do not bleach Tumble dry, low temperature Iron, low heat Dry cleaning any solvent, normal cycle

products.title: Multipocket Work Pants e.s.vintage
products.description: Tackle your tasks in true comfort and style with these multipocket work pants. With an old-school look but modern functionality, the pants are built with a stretchy Flexbelt® waistband and contain a middleweight cotton canvas material blended with some extra elastic for comfort and mobility. The pants include multiple utility pockets and dual hammer loops to help you perform on the job. The riveted front pockets also add an extra dose of durability. The e.s.vintage multipocket work pants are an ultimate piece of workwear…or casual wear. comfortable slim fit straight leg stretchy Flexbelt ® waistband 2 back pockets 2 slit pockets right front coin pocket left front zip pocket right leg ruler pocket with small attached multipocket with Velcro fastener suitable for large cell phone left leg 2nd cell phone pocket 2 hammer loops (right + left next to rear trouser pockets) carabiner hook below right waistband loop robust canvas material with a light washed effect contrasting accessories + quilting coordinated rivets to secure the front trouser pockets Material: 48% Cotton / 36% Elastomultiester / 16% Polyamide (approx. 9.14 oz/sq yard ) Care instructions: Machine wash 104 °F / 40 °C Do not bleach Tumble dry, low temperature Iron, low heat Dry cleaning any solvent, normal cycle

products.title: Murcia 6" Steel Toe Work Boot
products.description: Hit the job site in comfort and style with the Murcia 6" Steel Toe Work Boot. These certified safety boots have a steel toe and sole, so no need to worry about a rogue nail on the floor. They're waterproof, windproof, and can handle whatever weather your job throws at you. The dial based BOA® Fit System allows microadjustable precision fit and is engineered and guaranteed to perform. When it comes to enhanced safety features, the Murcia Mid has plenty to offer, with a heat-resistant certification up to nearly 400°F and a fuel-resistant (FO) certification, meaning your feet are protected against oil all the while retaining their shape and construction for long-term durability. For those who work in unpredictable conditions where weather and hazards are thrown at you all day long, grab a pair of the Murcia Mid Boots. ASTM F2413-18 certified safety shoe with steel toe cap and steel sole Comfortable safety shoe in MTB style BOA® Fit System for a microadjustable precision fit Maximum comfort and stability Leather upper with mesh insert Mesh tongue and collar Waterproof, windproof, and breathable thanks to dryplexx® membrane Soft padded tongue and collar Textile lining Full-surface, anatomically shaped, and removable insole Slip-resistant rubber / EVA outsole in accordance with SR (acc. to ASTM F3445-21) Static dissipative SD100 (acc. to ASTM F2413-18) Fuel-resistant FO and heat-resistant HRO up to approx. 200 °C (short-term up to approx. 300 °C) in accordance with EN ISO 20345:2022 Weight: 760 grams for size 9

products.title: Nail Bag e.s.iconic
products.description: Part of our Iconic line of products, this nail bag connects to any belt that uses our Fidlock System, like the e.s.tool concept. The pocket is designed for nails and other sharp objects that a normal pocket wouldn't stand up to. It's reinforced with a durable CORDURA lining and features 2 pen pockets on the side. Nail pocket with magnetic Fidlock system Elastic band closure 2 pen compartments on the side Robust CORDURA® inner lining for extra durability Pocket dimensions (W x H): approx. 5.91 x 7.28 in Material: Shell 98 % Cotton/ 2% Elastane (approx. 11.00 oz/sq yard ) Lining 100% Polyamide Care instructions: No washing Do not bleach Do not tumble dry Do not iron Do not dryclean

products.title: Nail Bag e.s.motion ten
products.description: Made with CORDURA® lining, the Nail Bag e.s.motion ten is built to withstand abrasion from sharp metal. The outside, which features a stylish worn look, is also extremely durable. Designed to work with magnetic Fidlock® system belts, this bag can bear a heavy load. It is easy to reach into and just as simple to close again with the elastic drawstring. Easy access to nails and screws Fabric has worn look With magnetic Fidlock® system* Fits across one module of the Fidlock® belt Load-bearing capacity of the magnetic fastener: up to 44 lbs Elastic band closure Two pen pockets on the side CORDURA® lining for greater durability Pocket size (WXH) approx. 5.9 x 7.28 in * Please note: The tool bag can only be attached to Fidlock® belts! * Delivery without content. Material: Shell: 46% Cotton / 38% Elastomultiester / 16% Polyamide (approx. 9,29 oz/sq yard ) First lining: 100% Polyamide Second lining: 100% Polyester Care instructions: Machine wash 104 °F / 40 °C Do not bleach Do not tumble dry Do not iron Do Not Dry clean This product has magnetic fasteners that could harm people with heart pacemakers, icd units or other medicinal implants.

products.title: Nails and Screws bag e.s.tool concept
products.description: The compact Nails and Screws Bag e.s.tool concept is designed to keep fasteners close at hand. Specially shaped reinforced pockets make working with long screws and nails a simple task. A magnetic surface for screwdriver bits lets you quickly switch from flathead to Phillips. You can use this bag on its own or attach it to other items magnetically or adhesively to expand your capacity. Part of the dynamic tool bag system, this bag helps you keep screws and nails at the ready Using the basic module with pockets, magnetically connectable on the left/right** with a chosen e.s.tool concept belt** Can be replaced or exchanged with other tool bags in the e.s.tool concept series Specially shaped openings facilitate the removal and storage of tools Suitable for the left and right side Reinforced pockets for optimum working with long screws and nails Special magnetic surface for screwdriver bits Bag dimensions (WxH): 4.72 x 8.27 in * Delivery does not include contents ** Not included in delivery Please note: The e.s.tool concept nail and screw bag can only be worn in the system with the e.s.tool concept products with an adhesive surface!

products.title: Nitrile Foam Gloves evertouch micro
products.description: Work with your tools with security rain or shine with these all-purpose gloves with a nitrile foam coating. They have a grippy palm that delivers optimal dexterity, perfect for precise assembly work. EN 388:2016, certified protection against mechanical risks, 4121X ANSI 105, Abrasion: 5, Cut (TDM): A1, Puncture: 1 extremely flexible polyamide fine-knit with a thin nitrile foam coating liquid-repellent extremely tactile glove with an ideal fit areas of use: suitable for the precise assembly work functional for operating touchscreens length: approx. 25 cm Material: Shell 95% Polyamide / 5% Elastane Palm 100% Nitrile Care instructions: No washing Do not bleach Do not tumble dry Do not iron Do not Dryclean

products.title: Nitrile Foam Gloves evertouch winter
products.description: Stay protected and productive in chilly weather with these winter work gloves. They’re built to handle mechanical risks like cutting, puncturing, and tearing, making them perfect for work in agriculture, forestry, and construction. The sturdy double lining provides extra protection against the cold. Just in case you need to make (or take) a call on the job, the special fingertip design is perfect for operating touchscreens. EN 388:2016, 4231B: Certified protection against mechanical risks EN 511:2006, X2X: Certified protection against the cold Crafted from an extremely flexible, fine knit polyamide Special fingertip design for operating touch screens Thick nitrile foam coating that's liquid-repellent Acrylic loop-knit on the inside for thermal insulation in the cold Sturdy double lining to protect against the cold Partially coated back to protect against moisture Best for: Dry and cold work environments, specifically agriculture, forestry, construction, or other outdoor work Length: approx. 10.24 in Material: Palm 100% Nitrile Shell 100% Polyamide Lining 100% Acrylic Care instructions: No washing Do not bleach Do not tumble dry Do not iron Do not dryclean
products.material: Palm 100% Nitrile Shell 100% Polyamide Lining 100% Acrylic

products.title: Omaha 6" Steel Toe Work Boot
products.description: Our Omaha 6" Steel Toe Work Boots are as stylish as they are durable. Certified for safety, they have a steel toe and sole, are static dissipative and heat resistant. They come with a suede tongue that has a closed construction to keep out dirt and also feature a removable sole for easy cleaning. With a Fuel-resistant certification, they'll protect and retain their sturdy construction when working on oily sites. So, if you work in a dynamic environment that gets oily and dirty, put the Omaha Mid to the ultimate test. ASTM F2413-18 certified safety shoe with steel toe cap and steel sole High-quality waxed nubuck leather upper Suede leather tongue Soft padded microfiber collar Textile lining with microfiber heel reinforcement Closed tongue construction prevents dirt from penetrating Full-surface, anatomically shaped, and removable insole Slip-resistant rubber/EVA outsole according to SR (acc. to ASTM F3445-21) Static dissipative SD100 (acc. to ASTM F2413-18) Fuel-resistant FO and heat-resistant HRO up to approx. 200 °C (short-term up to approx. 300 °C) in accordance with EN ISO 20345:2022 Weight: 770 grams for size 9

products.title: Philly Steel Toe Work Shoe
products.description: The Philly is a safety-certified shoe that's light weight despite its steel toe cap. It features a leather upper that's full of style. The midsole cushioning technology combined with the padded lining make for a supremely comfortable ride. Safety-wise, it's comes with a slip-resistant outsole, is static-dissipative, and FO rated. ASTM F2413-18 certified safety shoe with steel toe cap Leather upper Hard-wearing TPU overcap Microfiber tongue Padded tongue and collar Textile lining with microfiber heel reinforcement Full-length, anatomically shaped, and removable insole Slip-resistant rubber/EVA outsole according to SR (acc. to ASTM F3445-21) Static dissipative SD100 (acc. to ASTM F2413-18) Fuel-resistant FO according to EN ISO 20345:2022 Weight: 560 grams for size 9

products.title: Pocket-Protected Work Pants e.s.iconic
products.description: No more holes. No more frayed seams. These pocket protected pants are perfect for those who keep their gear close at hand. Designed for durability, these work pants feature a relaxed fit, triple-stitched main seams, and pre-shaped knee darts with knee pad pockets for added protection. The key to these pants is in the pockets — each one is reinforced with 100% polyamide, ensuring they withstand the toughest tasks. Relaxed-fit work pants with a stretchy construction Pre-shaped knees with darts for improved flexibility Knee pad pockets with reinforced fabric extending to the hem, secured with a hook-and-loop flap closure 2 square pockets at the front with a reinforced fabric, additional coin pocket on the right, zip pocket on the left, and hidden pockets on both sides for attaching a tape measure and knife with clip 2 back pockets with contrasting fabric reinforcements at the bottom and on the pocket openings Left back leg pocket up to the side seam with additional reinforced fabric Hammer loop Thin ruler pocket with contrasting reinforcements in the lower area and on the opening edge Reinforced fabric on the back trouser hem D-ring on the first right belt loop Triple-stitched main seams for maximum durability NEXT LEVEL KNEE PROTECTION Concealed, top-loading knee pad pockets Perfect ergonomics: Top-loading pocket that works with all knee pads for our STRAUSS work pants. A protective flap covers the pocket opening. This prevents the knee pads from slipping and from dust and debris getting in. Material: First shell: 98 % Cotton /2 % Elastane (approx. 10.91 oz/sq yard ) Second shell: 100% Polyamide (approx. 10.18 oz/sq yard ) Care instructions: Machine wash 104 °F / 40 °C Do not bleach Tumble dry, low temperature Iron on low heat Do not dry clean
products.material: shell: 98 % Cotton /2 % Elastane (approx. 10.91 oz/sq yard ) Second shell: 100% Polyamide (approx. 10.18 oz/sq yard )

products.title: Power Denim 5-Pocket Jeans
products.description: Unmatched durability meets unmatched comfort in the Power Denim 5-Pocket Jeans. Crafted from ultra-tough Dyneema® fibers and US cotton, they're lightweight yet incredibly tear-resistant. These jeans feature 4-way stretch, a Flexbelt® waistband for all-day ease, and reinforced seams that add to the sturdiness. With tool-ready details like hidden clip pockets, double hammer loops, and a painter loop, plus a modern stone washed or black-washed finish, they combine rugged performance with a sleek, utility-focused fit. Considered the “world’s strongest fiber™,” Dyneema® is an ultra-lightweight, high-strength fiber that has been proven to be 15 times stronger than steel. Originally developed for military and ballistic applications, the material’s exceptional strength-to-weight ratio, tear resistance, and abrasion resistance combine to provide unparalleled durability without compromising on comfort or flexibility. When blended with traditional cotton, you get a denim that enables you to move faster for longer, making you more tactical on the job—without sacrificing on protection. Regular fit Flexbelt® waistband Straight leg Regular hem 2 angled front pockets with black narrow piping at entries Hidden clip tool pockets at each front pocket 2 angled back pockets 2 hammer loops Stylish diagonal seams from back pockets towards outseams Inseam and outseam secured with single top stitching Double top stitching seam at rear for durability Material: Stonewashed: Shell 67 % Cotton / 23 % Polyester / 6% Polyethylene / 3% Elastolefin / 1% Elastane (approx. 10.74 oz/sq yard) Blackwashed: Shell 63 % Cotton / 25 % Polyester / 6% Polyethylene / 5% Elastolefin / 1% Elastane (approx. 11.00 oz/sq yard) Care Instructions: Machine wash warm 104 °F / 40 °C Do not bleach Normal tumble dry, low temperature Iron Medium heat Do not dryclean
products.material: Shell 67 % Cotton / 23 % Polyester / 6% Polyethylene / 3% Elastolefin / 1% Elastane (approx. 10.74 oz/sq yard) Blackwashed: Shell 63 % Cotton / 25 % Polyester / 6% Polyethylene / 5% Elastolefin / 1% Elastane (approx. 11.00 oz/sq yard)

products.title: Queenstown 6" Steel Toe Work Boot
products.description: The Queenstown is a midweight work boot certified for safety, with a steel toe cap, heat resistance, and a slip resistant EVA outsole. The upper is made from nubuck leather and the tongue features a closed construction to keep out dirt and debris. ASTM F2413-18 certified safety shoe with steel toe cap High-quality nubuck leather upper Padded mesh tongue and microfiber collar Textile lining with microfiber heel reinforcement Closed tongue construction prevents dirt from penetrating Full-surface, anatomically shaped, and removable insole Slip-resistant rubber/EVA outsole according to SR (acc. to ASTM F3445-21) Electrical hazard EH (acc. to ASTM F2413-18), in accordance with EN ISO 20345:2022 Fuel-resistant FO and heat-resistant HRO up to approx. 200 °C (short-term up to approx. 300 °C) Weight: 685 grams for size 9

products.title: Ridgewood 6" Soft Toe Boot
products.description: Durability, comfort, and stability define the Ridgewood 6" Soft Toe Boot, which offers reliable protection without the need of a safety cap. The dryplexx® membrane ensures waterproof, windproof, and breathable performance and comfort year-round. Featuring a rugged rubber outsole with a ledge for easy on/off and excellent ladder grip, this boot is ideal for farmers or performing light-duty work, all in a lightweight package with a sturdy waxed nubuck leather upper that's always in style. ASTM 2892-24 occupational shoe without protective toe cap EN ISO 20347:2022 + A1:2024 fuel-resistant FO and conditionally heat-resistant up to approx. 300°F SD100 Static dissipative SR Slip resistance class Waterproof, windproof, and breathable thanks to dryplexx® membrane High-quality waxed nubuck leather upper Leather tongue with wax nubuck leather application Soft padded mesh collar Comfortable textile lining with flap Collar lining made of soft padded mesh Closed tongue construction prevents dirt and debris from entering the shoe Full-surface, anatomically shaped and removable insole Rubber/EVA sole with all-round TPU reinforcement Approx. 1.5 lbs for size 9

products.title: Rimini 6" Soft Toe Boot
products.description: Step onto the jobsite with the Rimini 6" Soft Toe Boot and know your feet are secure. This soft toe work boot features a high-quality suede upper that has been enhanced with an advanced waterproof and windproof dryplexx® membrane to keep your feet cool and fresh at work. This boot has also been put to the test. It has certified slip resistance and protects against the build up of static electricity. On top of that, the shoe follows fuel-resistance safety standards, ensuring the Rimini Mid can withstand the damaging effects of oil exposure while also maintaining excellent traction on slick surfaces. ASTM F2892-18 certified occupational shoe without toe cap waterproof, windproof, and breathable thanks to dryplexx® membrane rubber toe cap for increased abrasion protection high-quality suede upper comfortable, breathable padded mesh tongue, collar, and textile lining closed tongue construction prevents dirt from penetrating full-surface, anatomically shaped, and removable insole rubber/EVA outsole slip resistance class SR (acc. to ASTM F3445-21) static dissipative SD100 (acc. to ASTM F2892-18) fuel-resistant FO in accordance with EN ISO 20347:2022 Weight: 550 grams for size 9

products.title: Ripstop Cargo Work Pants e.s.e:pic
products.description: Look sharper. Perform better. Keep cooler. These ripstop cargo pants may be lightweight and flexible, but they’re unapologetically heavy-duty and breathable. Elastic Flexbelt® waistband Darted knees for freedom of movement Secure knee pad pockets Comfortable, mesh-lined interior knee pocket 2 rounded reinforced slash pockets Integrated coin pocket within the right slash pocket Zip pocket on the left side Side pockets on each thigh for attaching a tape measure and knife 2 back welt pockets, one with a flap and snap fastener 2 side pockets on the back with a hammer loop Knife pocket on the right leg with reinforced opening Secure cell phone pocket Deep cargo pocket on the left leg with an internal cell phone pocket and secondary zip pocket All pocket flaps have a firm insert to strengthen the hold D-ring next to the first belt loop on the right side Triple-stitched seams on the inner leg Why we made it: The industry standards for hot weather, heavy-duty work pants wasn’t quite cutting it for some of our customers, so we went out and re-engineered a classic. The Ripstop Cargo Work Pants e.s.e:pic combine the signature toughness of cotton duck work pants but with a more lightweight, breathable ripstop fabric that’s just as strong but much more comfortable on hot days. The triple-stitched seams, reinforced knees, and utility pockets provide necessary support when the job gets tough. And the sharp, polished fit has you looking professional everywhere you go. Material: The fabric was engineered to be unbelievably lightweight, breathable, and tear-resistant but with a bit of stretch to prevent any tugging—allowing you to work with ease. Shell 50% Polyamide / 48% Cotton / 2% Elastane (approx. 6.34 oz/sq yard) Size and fit: A comfortable, relaxed fit with a medium rise on the waist Straight cut legs for a more polished look on site The Flexbelt® waistband expands with you as you move on the job Darted knees provide extra freedom of movement Elastic fabric offers plenty of stretch, perfect for active job sites. Care instructions: Machine-wash at warm: 104 °F / 40 °C Do not bleach Tumble dry on low temperature Iron on low heat Do not dry clean
products.material: Shell 50% Polyamide / 48% Cotton / 2% Elastane (approx. 6.34 oz/sq yard)

products.title: Ruler/Knife Pocket e.s.tool concept, left
products.description: Created with carpenters in mind, the Ruler/Knife Pocket, left e.s.tool concept provides compact storage and simple access for essentials. There are specially shaped openings for a yardstick, boxcutter, and pencil, as well as a multipurpose loop for easy attachment and removal. You can use this bag on its own or attach it to other items to expand your capacity. This version is suitable for use on the left side. Part of the dynamic tool bag system, this small, left-sided pocket is ideal for a knife, yardstick, carpenter's pencil and more! Using the basic module with pockets, magnetically connectable on the left with a chosen e.s.tool concept belt** Can be replaced or exchanged with other tool bags in the e.s.tool concept series Specially shaped openings facilitate the removal and storage of tools Suitable for the left side Convenient for all traids but with pockets designed for carpenters Bag dimensions (WxH): 4.72 x 8.27 in * Delivery does not include contents ** Not included in delivery Please note: The ruler/knife pocket e.s.tool concept can only be worn in the system with the e.s.tool concept products with an adhesive surface! products.title: St. Louis Comp Toe Work Shoe
products.description: The St. Louis is a safety-certified shoe that comes in a lightweight package thanks to its protective, 100 % metal-free Nanotoe™ plastic toe cap. products.title: STRAUSS X 1620 Multipocket Pants
products.description: Guaranteed for Life. STRAUSS has joined forces with 1620 Workwear for a limited-edition collection of highly technical, “Made in the USA” work pants, exclusively available in the US at STRAUSS.com. The pants are specifically designed for master craftsmen and those in the trades, with purposeful pocket placements that add utility and help you on the job. This feature-rich upgrade of the iconic American utility pant is constructed with 1620’s new lightweight Stretch NYCO twill that is homegrown, technical, tactical, and flexible, so it'll stand up to whatever your job throws at you. STRAUSS’ signature Flexbelt® adds extra comfort and prevents the pants from pulling and clinging as you stretch and bend. 1620 Lifetime Guarantee Comfortable fit thanks to Flexbelt® waistband Straight leg 2 front pockets with CORDURA® reinforcement and "clip pockets" for a pocket tape measure or knife Money pockets with space for a cell phone on both sides 2 ruler pockets (on the right and left sides) beneath the back pockets 2 large patch back pockets 2 additional seam pockets in the back yoke seam 2 hammer loops The bar tack of the gray version comes tone-in-tone, and the black version comes with contrasting STRAUSS red stitching Exclusively Available in the US at STRAUSS.com Material: Shell 59% Cotton /37 % Polyamide/4% Elastane (approx. 8.26 oz/sq yard ) Care instructions: Machine wash 86 °F / 30 °C Do not bleach Tumble dry, low temperature Iron low heat Do not dryclean
products.material: Shell 59% Cotton /37 % Polyamide/4% Elastane (approx. 8.26 oz/sq yard )

products.title: STRAUSS X 1620 Worker Pants
products.description: Guaranteed for Life. STRAUSS has joined forces with 1620 USA to create this limited-edition, highly technical, “Made in the USA” Worker work pant — a combination of German engineering and American ingenuity. The Worker pants are built with 1620’s new lightweight Stretch NYCO twill that is homegrown, technical, tactical, and flexible so it'll stand up to whatever your job throws at you. The durable fabric is coupled with STRAUSS’ signature Flexbelt®, which provides extra comfort and stretch. The Worker pants were designed with purposeful pocket placements for improved utility. They have reinforced knees with knee pad pockets, offering added protection and comfort to those of us who must occasionally work from the floor. 1620 Lifetime Guarantee Comfortable fit thanks to the Flexbelt waistband Straight leg 2 front pockets with CORDURA® reinforcement and "clip pockets" for a pocket tape measure or knife Money pockets with space for a cell phone on both sides 2 ruler pockets (on the right and left sides) beneath the back pockets 2 large patch back pockets 2 additional seam pockets in the back yoke seam 2 hammer loops 2 knee pad pockets with flaps and a hook-and-loop closure The bar tack of the moon gray version comes tone-in-tone, and the meteorite version comes with contrasting STRAUSS red stitching Exclusively Available in the US at STRAUSS.com NEXT LEVEL KNEE PROTECTION Concealed top-loading knee pad pockets Perfect ergonomics: Top-loading pocket that works with all knee pads for our STRAUSS work pants. A protective flap covers the pocket opening. This prevents the knee pads from slipping and from dust and debris getting in. Material: Shell 59% Cotton /37 % Polyamide/4% Elastane (approx. 8.26 oz/sq yard ) Care instructions: Machine wash 86 °F / 30 °C Do not bleach Tumble dry, low temperature Iron low heat Do not dryclean

products.title: Stretch Ripstop Cargo Work Bib Overall e.s.t:aktik
products.description: Lighter, more durable, and more comfortable than your old-school work bib, this version is about straight-up performance when the weather gets hot. With design inspiration from the ranch life, these have been revamped with an ultra-lightweight ripstop fabric that stretches, breathes, and withstands abrasion and wear. The reinforced seams and pockets provide an extra dose of reliability and utility when you’re putting them to the test. Gear up knowing you’ll be cool, calm, and protected when you get to work. Classic fit Straight cut Elastic waistband with adjustable side gussets for comfort Lightweight, stretch performance ripstop fabric 2 square pockets with reinforcement, additional zip pocket on the left side Integrated hidden pockets on each side for attaching a tape measure or knife with a clip 2 back pockets both with a flap closure 2 side cargo pockets with a flap closure Adjustable hem with elastic cord and stopper Front bib: Large pocket with flap and hook-and-loop fastener Flexible straps with length-adjustable buckle Reinforced seams with single topstitching Material: Shell 96% Polyamide / 4% Elastan (approx. 4.60 oz/sq yard) Care instructions: Machine wash warm 104 °F / 40 °C Do not bleach Normal tumble dry (low temperature) Iron low heat Do not dry clean

products.title: Tampa Steel Toe Work Shoe
products.description: The Tampa is a safety-certified shoe that's light weight despite its steel toe cap. It features a suede upper that's full of style. The midsole cushioning technology combined with the padded lining make for a supremely comfortable ride. Safety-wise, it's comes with a slip-resistant outsole, is static-dissipative, and FO rated. ASTM F2413-18 certified safety shoe with steel toe cap Suede upper and tongue Soft padded textile lining with microfiber heel reinforcement and collar Full-length and removable insole Innovative midsole cushioning technology Slip-resistant rubber outsole according to SR (acc. to ASTM F3445-21) Static dissipative SD100 (acc. to ASTM F2413-18) Fuel-resistant FO according to EN ISO 20345:2022 Weight: 535 grams for size 9

products.title: Tool Belt e.s.iconic
products.description: Manage your tools With a magnetic holding system Built to carry the heaviest of tools with absolute ease, the Tool Belt e.s.iconic lets you easily reposition, exchange, and completely reassemble your gear at any time. It features a comfortable padded construction, and the simple tool storage solution provides limitless opportunities to stash your gear. We've equipped the belt with five perfectly coordinated tool pouches that fit within a magnetic connecting system that way you can store your gloves, cordless drills, cell phone or any safety leash to keep you ready on the job. Connect your gear effortlessly and it's there exactly when you need it. products.title: Turin 6" Aluminum Toe Work Boot
products.description: Comfort, protection, and arch support define the hard-hitting Turin 6" Aluminum Toe Work Boot. The waterproof, windproof, and breathable dryplexx® membrane keeps your feet cool and dry on the job. A durable, puncher-resistant outsole made from ceramic-treated textile fibers provides unmatched protection, while the threads ensure superb traction. Sturdy work-ready suede leather and an aluminum toe cap help you tackle heavy-duty jobs without worry. ASTM F2413-18 certified safety shoe with aluminum toe cap and puncture-resistant sole made from ceramic-treated textile fibers in accordance with the latest EN ISO 22568-2:2019 Waterproof, windproof, and breathable thanks to dryplexx® membrane Rubber overcap for increased abrasion protection Upper made of high-quality suede Mesh tongue and collar Comfortable textile lining with padded mesh tongue and collar Closed tongue prevents dirt penetration Full-surface, anatomically shaped and removable insole Rubber/EVA outsole Slip resistance class SR (acc. to ASTM F3445-21) Static dissipative SD100 (acc. to ASTM F2413-18) Fuel-resistant FO in accordance with EN ISO 20345:2022 Weight: 630 grams for size 9

products.description: Stay warm without any bulk in this seamless thermal long sleeve built as the ideal base layer for cold workdays. Ideal under jackets, sweatshirts or simply worn solo, it’s the foundation for cold-weather performance. products.title: Windbreaker light-pack e.s.trail
products.description: This e.s.trail windbreaker is the ultimate lightweight jacket. You can easily fold and stow the entire jacket into the hood, making it perfect for working in unpredictable weather. Like most windbreakers, the jacket keeps out the wind, and the taped seams and inner membrane prevent water penetration. That said, we've developed this jacket with a technical construction so that, even though the seams are sealed, the jacket retains a high level of breathability, so you don't overheat. It’s perfect for tough, rainy days at work, and, when you don't need it anymore, just fold it up into the hood. products.description: A perfect match in design and functionality, these work pants are cut to a looser, relaxed fit and are built for a wide range of environments where you'd like peak performance but with a more traditional work look. products.title: Women's Leggings e.s.e:pic
products.description: The e.s.e:pic Women’s Leggings combine the comfort of leggings with the durability of real workwear. ASTM F2413-24 safety shoe with steel toe cap EN ISO 22568-2:2019 puncture-resistant sole (PR) made of ceramic-treated textile fibers EN ISO 20345:2022 + A1:2024 fuel-resistant FO and conditionally heat-resistant up to approx. 300°F SD100 Static dissipative SR Slip resistance class Waterproof, windproof, and breathable upper thanks to dryplexx® membrane Upper and tongue made of high-quality wax nubuck leather BOA® Fit System for an easily adjustable, precise fit Warm and soft fleece interior lining at the ankle Padded tongue and ankle Closed tongue construction prevents dirt and debris from entering the shoe Full-surface, anatomically shaped and removable insole Rubber/EVA sole with all-round TPU reinforcement Approx. 1.9 lbs for size 9

products.title: Work Pants e.s.iconic
products.description: Combining functional design with a casual look, the Work Pants e.s.iconic are made for getting heavy work done in laid-back style. The relaxed fit and elastic stretch fabric blend provide freedom of movement and comfort, while triple seams in heavy-wear areas provide durability for hard grafting. A selection of pockets and loops ensure the right tools are always to hand.
